name: @nocki/cli
description: Local development process orchestrator — boot ordering, health checks, supervision, and unified logs for multi-service projects.

scripts.build:all: bun build ./src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/nocki-darwin-arm64 && bun build ./src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile dist/nocki-darwin-x64 && bun build ./src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/nocki-linux-x64 && bun build ./src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile dist/nocki-linux-arm64
